name: each persisted rule object carries a content hash so changes can be detected
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --persist --out view.yaml 2>/dev/null; ruby -ryaml -e 'r=YAML.unsafe_load_file("view.yaml")["rules"]; exit(r.values.all?{|o| o["_hash"].to_s.length>=16} ? 0 : 1)' && echo objects-hashed 1>&2
